name: Kimchi Coin
description: Kimchi is an ERC20 meme token inspired by Kimchi, the adorable Shiba Inu who won the #ChooseMyShibe contest hosted by House of Doge. Alongside her owner Phoebe, Kimchi proudly represented the Dogecoin community at the Nasdaq Exchange during the historic launch of the Dogecoin ETF (TDOG) in partnership with 21Shares. The project symbolizes the powerful journey of meme culture from internet roots to mainstream finance.
